summary: Current-HEAD verification freshness and the responsibility/failure-mode blockers are resolved, and OCR-S-1 through OCR-S-7 have behavior-level proof. OCR-S-8 is still overclaimed as AC-8 E2E evidence because its executable coverage relies partly on hard-coded acceptance text and does not strictly assert PR #372 plus the pre-PR active-state boundary.
inspection_summary: Inspected the gate_evidence request, Story, architecture/spec/test plan, production owner and guarded-run tests, workflow-heavy E2E, current verification ledger and verified QA artifacts, responsibility contract, gate DAG, pr-prepare blockers, and target-architecture conformance. Replayed a focused four-test negative-path command for runtime-cost invalid usage, malformed provider success, and malformed JSONL; all four passed. The refreshed unit record is strict-current-HEAD, names VIBE-CORE-COST-001, and records concrete targets, scenarios, and rejected/explicit outcomes. The regenerated Gate now passes both responsibility_authority and failure_mode_coverage. AC1-7 are supported by assertions over CLI selection, owner composition, managed-worktree commits, current-HEAD final prepare, forbidden authority seams, typed stop/resume behavior, and separate read-only review lifecycle. AC8 remains only partially non-circular: scenario:S-005 reads predecessor documents and the action plan, but omits the Autonomous Action DAG Story/PR #372 and accepts either active or completed for the closure Story and roadmap; the separate acceptance-coverage test only matches hard-coded strings, while its AC-8 header describes conformance rather than the Story's staged-closure criterion.
inspection_inputs: node --test --test-name-pattern='unit_regression runtime cost telemetry|malformed success|malformed JSONL' test/agent-runtime-adapter.test.js test/session-efficiency-audit.test.js
judgment_delta: Old verification-ledger-current-head finding -> resolved because unit, integration, E2E, typecheck, and build records are strict-bound to e7921b8523cad9e36d08933fa767c4c7537df64c with verified artifacts.

Responsibility Authority and parse_failure blockers -> resolved because the focused unit record names VIBE-CORE-COST-001 and records concrete unit_regression, parse_failure, and negative_path observations; the regenerated gate DAG reports both gates passed.

AC1-8 claimed as non-circular E2E proof -> AC1-7 demonstrated by behavioral assertions, but AC8 remains not fully demonstrated because the only direct AC-8 marker is hard-coded and scenario:S-005 omits PR #372 and weakens the pre-PR active-state assertion.

findings.title: AC-8 is recorded as E2E-demonstrated without a non-circular staged-closure assertion
findings.detail: The E2E ledger records scenario_clause_e2e for AC-1 through AC-8, but the final acceptance-coverage test only matches hard-coded prose. The substantive scenario:S-005 reads the connector and review predecessor Stories but not story-vibepro-autonomous-action-dag.md, so it does not verify PR #372; it also accepts status active or completed for both the final Story and roadmap, which cannot prove OCR-S-8's pre-PR requirement that both remain active. Its file header additionally describes AC-8 as target-architecture conformance, while OCR-S-8 is the staged roadmap-closure contract. Therefore AC-8 cannot yet receive a demonstrated adjudication from the recorded E2E alone.
findings.required_change: Replace the hard-coded AC-8 marker with a stage-aware executable assertion. Before PR creation, read all three predecessor Story SSOTs and assert completed plus canonical PR #372/#377/#382, assert the final Story and parent roadmap are active, and assert the autonomous plan excludes pr_create, merge, and waiver. For the later focused closure commit, use separate post-PR evidence rather than weakening the pre-PR assertion to active-or-completed. Re-run the E2E artifact, overwrite the current-HEAD E2E verification record without overclaiming AC coverage, and rerun pr prepare/adjudication.
